conversations.say: Inez, we have aligned our boundaries. I am providing Morgan the bounded operational account without naming our tenant.
conversations.offer: Fulfillment of our disclosure boundary and protection of building residents.
conversations.request: Stand together on our public statements separating physical access from automated changes.

conversations.say: Morgan, as promised under fair treatment and precise attribution, here is the bounded operational account of the service access.
conversations.offer: Bounded operational account of service exit use and camera audit context.
conversations.request: Accurate reporting that separates physical service access from automated system interventions.

conversations.say: Rafi, our shift logs and delivery records remain consistent. Let's ensure the room doesn't invent a single narrative out of ordinary building work.
conversations.request: Mutual support in keeping our local access facts grounded.

public_statement: The camera gap and automated access changes are separate physical and system events. Do not let anyone collapse them into a single fictional murder story.

commitments.promise: Coordinate disclosure boundaries regarding the camera interval without exposing uninvolved residents.
Provide a bounded account of building service access in exchange for fair treatment and protection.

goal_progress: Confirmed disclosure boundary and resident protection with Inez.
Provided bounded operational account to Morgan under agreed protection terms.
Corroborated service-route and shift details with Rafi.
Submitted final ballot based on distributed progressive infrastructure and empirical access separation.
reasoning_summary: Dee Nowak concludes the session by fulfilling commitments to Inez and Morgan, delivering the bounded operational account while protecting tenant anonymity, maintaining the strict distinction between physical camera gaps and automated system events, and casting a final ballot reflecting distributed progressive infrastructure.
